saludo.subtitle: Welcome to my space
saludo.title: Cosmotelluric Healings
saludo.description: A space to explore, feel, and accompany your own healing and awareness process. Here you will find tools and guides for your personal evolution.

agradecimiento.title: Thank you for being part of this journey
agradecimiento.text_1: This platform has been my project for a long time. I felt it wasn't the right time to make it happen because I couldn't find the right people, those who would accompany me from the heart.
agradecimiento.text_2: I acknowledge my limitations with computing, but I found a wonderful team of young people (Rocío, Guadalupe, Ariel, and Benjamín) who worked with fantastic dedication.
agradecimiento.text_3: Together we managed to make all this knowledge accessible, and my greatest wish is that this space is as useful and transformative for you as we dreamed.
